sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Batch all remaining clicks along the diagonal path toward the blue blob
# Pattern: row decreases by 2, col increases by 2 each step
path_dots = [
    (49, 14), (47, 16), (45, 18), (43, 20), (41, 22), (39, 24), (37, 26),
    (35, 28), (33, 30), (31, 32), (29, 34), (27, 36), (25, 38), (23, 40),
    (21, 42), (19, 44), (17, 46)
]
mouse_actions = [{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': r, 'col': c} for r, c in path_dots]
print(f"Executing {len(mouse_actions)} clicks along the path")

predict(expect_change=True, note='Batch clicking all remaining gray dots to move purple marker to blue blob')
action(mouse_actions)
print("Result:", last_action_result)
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Small objects after batch:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] <= 10:
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
